description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a prominent fixed stock and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The upper receiver is equipped with a rail-mounted red dot sight, enhancing target acquisition in urban environments. The barrel is of standard length and appears to be free-floating, with no visible muzzle device attached. A detachable box magazine is inserted in front of the trigger guard, typical for semi-automatic or automatic rifles. The overall finish is matte black, with subtle blue highlights near the receiver and stock. The construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, providing both durability and reduced weight.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, pistol grip, red dot sight, and detachable box magazine. It features a modern, streamlined design with blue accent details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the fixed stock, pistol grip, red dot sight, and detachable magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel end, sight alignment, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features with clear visibility of the stock, grip, and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and sight, with the barrel and magazine less visible.
